instruction: Two subtle issues on the cloud drizzle icon: the yellow price tag is the wrong shade (slightly-darker black) AND it has drifted slightly (~2px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-drizzle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="8" y1="19" x2="8" y2="21"/><line x1="8" y1="13" x2="8" y2="15"/><line x1="16" y1="19" x2="16" y2="21"/><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="16" y2="15"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="17"/><path d="M20 16.58A5 5 0 0 0 18 7h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 4 15.25"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#212121" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="86" y="98" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/cloud-drizzle.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><line x1="8" y1="19" x2="8" y2="21"/><line x1="8" y1="13" x2="8" y2="15"/><line x1="16" y1="19" x2="16" y2="21"/><line x1="16" y1="13" x2="16" y2="15"/><line x1="12" y1="21" x2="12" y2="23"/><line x1="12" y1="15" x2="12" y2="17"/><path d="M20 16.58A5 5 0 0 0 18 7h-1.26A8 8 0 1 0 4 15.25"/></g>
  <rect id="price-tag" fill="#fde047" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="84" y="96" width="28" height="14" />
</svg>
